title: Clovercraft Quality of Life Pack
description: A basic set of mods that make playing on the Clovercraft server more enjoyable
body:
The Clovercraft Quality-of-Life modpack adds a small number of mods to the vanilla game to make playing on our server even better. Navigate the world using both a world map and mini-map, set custom location markers, and even make use of our in-game proximity voice chat!

This pack does not include any large client side tool mods or heavy graphical upgrades. For a wider set of mods, please see our [ultimate pack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/clovercraft-ultimate).
